hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); BLOCKED=(".env" "package-lock.json" ".git/"); for p in "${BLOCKED[@]}"; do if [[ "$FILE" == *"$p"* ]]; then echo "Blocked: $FILE matches protected pattern $p" >&2; exit 2; fi; done; exit 0'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); if [[ "$FILE" == *.ts || "$FILE" == *.tsx ]]; then cd "c:/computer-study/project/obsidian-web-editor" && npx eslint "$FILE" --fix 2>/dev/null || true; fi'
